title: 11L Gated XSA + Cosine LN Scale + Int6
body:
## Summary

11-layer int6 model with gated exclusive self-attention, cosine LN scale decay, SmearGate, BigramHash, EMA, late QAT, partial RoPE (16 dims), and stride-64 sliding window eval. 26.8M params under 16MB with zstd-22.

XSA uses a learned per-layer sigmoid gate to control how much of the self-value projection gets removed, instead of the standard binary on/off. Cosine LN scale gives a smoother depth-dependent dampening than inverse sqrt. Both are zero-cost additions that let the model tune its own layer dynamics during training.
